---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: hero
# Philippe Remusat

### Principal Statistical Programmer · R · Shiny

Bridging clinical data science and modern open source — from FDA submissions to interactive dashboards.

[View projects ↓](#projects)    [About me](about.qmd)    [GitHub](https://github.com/FlipR-data)
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Projects {#projects}

:::::: project-grid
::: project-card
#### 🏥 Pharma & Clinical

**Adverse Event Explorer**\
Interactive Shiny dashboard for CDISC ADaM safety data exploration.\
`Shiny` `CDISC` `ADaM` `Teal`\
[View project →](projects/pharma/index.qmd)
:::

::: project-card
#### ⚽ Sport Analytics

**World Football R**\
Scouting reports, shot maps and transfer values for top players.\
`worldfootballR` `ggplot2` `plotly` `ggsoccer`\
[View project →](projects/football/index.qmd)
:::

::: project-card
#### 📈 Finance

**Portfolio Risk Dashboard**\
Interactive dashboard for portfolio returns and risk metrics.\
`Shiny` `quantmod` `tidyquant`\
[View project →](projects/finance/index.qmd)
:::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-strip
**20+ years** in clinical programming  ·  **Roche · Novartis · Debiopharm**  ·  **FDA · EMA · PMDA** submissions  ·  **R · SAS · Shiny**
:::
